overall.description: Nighttime driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through the hazy neon-lit streets of Night City. The journey begins on an elevated highway, passes through a concrete tunnel, and continues through urban intersections with heavy digital billboard signage and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with overhead directional signage

events.description: approaching and entering concrete tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway following traffic, approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: red van driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large gantry sign with directional arrows pointing to SOCAL left and SANTO DOMINGO right
tall pole-mounted lamps illuminating the highway
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway at night through hazy conditions, following a red van toward a tunnel entrance. Overhead signs indicate directions to SOCAL and SANTO DOMINGO districts while street lights cut through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved concrete underpass tunnel with advertisement displays

events.description: entered enclosed tunnel with concrete walls
ambient light drops significantly, switching to artificial tunnel lighting
exiting tunnel back to open environment

agents.ego_description: driving through the curved concrete tunnel following the vehicle ahead

entered.detail: smooth curved concrete walls of the underpass structure
fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
illuminated vertical panels displaying advertisements on tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: Driving through a curved concrete tunnel with artificial lighting and digital advertisement panels on the walls. The environment is enclosed with no sky visibility, creating a stark contrast to the open highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road approaching commercial intersection

events.description: exiting tunnel back to open night environment with neon signage visible
slowing to stop at red traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: driving on wet city streets approaching an intersection, passing a 24/7 store

notable_agents.action: pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk near the 24/7 store

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for 24/7 convenience store with blue and red lettering
palm trees lining the side of the road
gantry with directional signage spanning the roadway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel onto wet city streets with a 24/7 convenience store visible. Palm trees line the road as the vehicle approaches an intersection with overhead signage, slowing to stop at a red light where pedestrians are waiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with overhead digital advertising gantries

events.description: stopped at red traffic light at Marseille street intersection
traffic light changes to green, preparing to proceed

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light observing overhead digital billboards and pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the vehicle
black car waiting in adjacent lane at the intersection

entered.detail: large metal truss structure spanning the road with multiple digital advertisement screens
red illuminated street sign indicating the Marseille district

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a red light under a massive gantry of digital billboards in the Marseille district. Pedestrians cross the street while the camera pans to observe the vibrant neon advertisements overhead. The traffic light turns green after a brief wait.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with tall corporate buildings and rotating billboards

events.description: accelerating through intersection as traffic light turns green
camera tilts upward to view tall building facade with red signage

agents.ego_description: driving through intersection and proceeding down city street, briefly looking up at towering corporate building

notable_agents.action: tan SUV driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: massive corporate building with prominent red illuminated signage covering the facade
tall structure with rotating cylindrical digital advertisement display
signage indicating nearby public transit station

segments.scene_description: Accelerating through the green light into a downtown commercial corridor. The camera tilts up to reveal a massive building covered in red neon signage, then returns to street level as the vehicle passes a rotating cylindrical billboard and continues through the neon-lit city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a hazy, elevated highway into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic city. It begins by following a red van through a foggy night, passing overhead signs for SOCAL and SANTO DOMINGO before entering a curved concrete tunnel. The environment shifts from the open air to an enclosed space of artificial lights and digital wall panels, which then opens up again onto wet city streets lined with palm trees and a 24/7 convenience store. As the vehicle slows to a stop at a red light in the Marseille district, the camera pans upward to observe a massive gantry of vibrant digital billboards and crossing pedestrians. Finally, the car accelerates through the green light into a commercial corridor, tilting up toward a towering building draped in red neon and passing a rotating cylindrical billboard as it merges into the glowing downtown traffic.
